reference: Hi, your liver function test report is fine. Alanine aminotransferase is high due to hepatitis or, you can say, liver inflammation. But don't worry, it's mildly high; just stay on a healthy diet, and it will come back to normal.
text: Hi, your liver function test report is fine. Alanine amino transferase is high. Do the hepatitis score? You can say liver inflammation, but don't worry, it's mildly high. Just stay on a healthy diet, and it will come back to normal.
